title: Create: Railgun
description: Adds the railgun from Project Wingman to Create
body:
# Create: Railgun

**For compat with CBC 5.11.3 or lower, use version 1.0.2 or lower of this mod. Future releases will only support CBC 5.11.4 or higher**

Adds the railgun from *Project Wingman* to create. This mod is *recommended* to be played with *Create: Aeronautics* but it is not required. 

Fires a fast-moving explosive projectile, perfect as a ship or plane mounted long-range cannon.

![Railgun firing from Create: Aeronautics plane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NPu99btt/images/d65bdbe3e21adeab9643c97cc7e7555cd056db94.png)

**What does this mod add?**

- Multiblock railgun
- Create Big Cannons "burst" shell that fires multiple railgun shots in a spread pattern
- New 'cordium' material that burns 16 items in a furnace (160 per block)
- Cordium blocks can also be used as explosives
- Crafting recipes for everything

**Other Notes:**

- **This mod does not add any power sources so you WILL need another mod to supply power.**
- Recommended to use JEI to view the recipes. Railgun assembly procedure can be viewed with Ponder
- Railguns will take into account the velocity of the current physics object when firing when *Sable* is installed to avoid firing into itself.
